urdu transliteration text:
Chaos erupted!
Kohraam mach gaya
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

Khaime may aake shah ne jab alwida kaha
kohraam mach gaya
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: When Hussain (a.s.) came into the tent and said goodbye, chaos erupted!

urdu transliteration text:
tha jiska intezar wo sa'ath qareeb hai
din dhal raha hai shame musibat qareeb hai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The hour awaited by the Ahle Bayt is near, As the day draws to a close, tribulations are near

urdu transliteration text:
kuch dayr ki hai baat qayamat qareeb hai
zainab ghareeb bhai ki ruksat qareeb hai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: It’s just a short while away, reckoning is near. Poor exiled Zainab, her brother's departure is near

urdu transliteration text:
ye keh ke maanga maa ka jo kurta sila hua
kohraam mach gaya...
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: When he asked Zainab (SA) for the shirt his Mother (SA) had made for his martyrdom, chaos erupted

urdu transliteration text:
kuch door hatke qaime may bole shahe zaman
zehmat na ho baazu badhao behan
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The King-of-the-time asked Zainab (SA), “If it's not too much trouble, can you extend your arms?”

urdu transliteration text:
mai bosay loo waha ke bandhegi jahan rasan
baazu badha ke roti thi hamsheer khastatan
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: So I can kiss the places where ropes will be tied, The sister of the hungry & thirsty cried while extending her arms

urdu transliteration text:
bhai behan ke baazu ko jab choomne laga
kohraam mach gaya...
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: When Hussain (AS) started kissing the arms of Zainab (SA), chaos erupted!

urdu transliteration text:
ye sunke binte Fatema Zehra tadap gayi
boli gala badhao bas jald ab ya aqi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The daughter of Fatima (SA) quivered when she heard the goodbye, She said ‘Hussain (AS) extend your neck, Oh brother’

urdu transliteration text:
amma ki baat aaj mujhe yaad aagayi
mai bosay loo wahan ke chalegi jahan churi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: I just remembered a quote from our Mother (SA), ‘Let me kiss the places where the knife will strike’

urdu transliteration text:
zainab ne badke chooma baradar ka jab gala
kohraam mach gaya...
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: When Zainab (SA) kissed the neck of her brother (AS), chaos erupted!

urdu transliteration text:
beti se phir ye kehne laga fatema ka laal
rehna phupi ke paas rakhengi tera khayal
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The son of Fatima (AS) started talking to his daughter (SA), Stay with your aunt, she will take care of you now

urdu transliteration text:
ghurbat hai tum phupi se na karna koi sawaal
warna tere padar ko bahot hoyega malaal
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Hardships are upon us, please don't give her a hard time. Otherwise your father will be saddened.

urdu transliteration text:
phir sar pe haath rakh ke jo dene lagay dua
kohraam mach gaya...
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Then when he placed his hand on his daughter's hand and gave her best wishes, chaos erupted!

urdu transliteration text:
beti ko jab supurde behan kar chuke imam
rokar behan se kehne lagay aasman maqam
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: When the Imam entrusted his sister with his daughter,Crying, he said to his sister

urdu transliteration text:
jaana watan jo qaid se chutkar ay tishnaqam
kehna lehad pe maa ki mera aakhri salam
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: When you return home from imprisonment,Give mother my final Salaam

urdu transliteration text:
aaya jo lab pe fatema zehra ka taskira
kohraam mach gaya...
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: When the mention of Fatima Zehra came out, chaos erupted!

urdu transliteration text:
abid se phir ye kehne lagay shahe karbala
bewaon ka aur yateemo ka ab tum ho aasra
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Shah-e-Karbala said to the 4th Imam ‘You’re now the support of the widowed and orphaned’

urdu transliteration text:
jo imtehan mera tha sab maine dediya
aagay tera jihad hai bemaare karbala
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: I’ve given all the tests meant for me,Now it will be your struggle.

urdu transliteration text:
bemaar beta baap se jis dam juda hua
kohraam mach gaya...
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The moment the ill son separated from his father, chaos erupted!

urdu transliteration text:
qaime se baahar aaye jo sultane karbala
sar ko jhukaye hue rota tha khud aspe bawafa
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: When The King of Karbala came out of the tent, With his head down, God's devotee used to cry alone

urdu transliteration text:
ab kis tarha sawaar ho zehra ka laadla
tanhai ke siwa koi yawar nahi bacha
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: How can Fatima's (SA) son mount the horse alone? He has no assistants left except solitude!

urdu transliteration text:
jab suye nehr dekh ke ghazi ko di sada
kohraam mach gaya...
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: When he looked towards the river (Euphrates) and cried out for Abbas (AS), chaos erupted!

urdu transliteration text:
bhai ko tanha dekh ke zainab tadap gayi
roti hui hussain ke nazdeek aa gayi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Zainab became restless seeing her lonesome brother. Crying, she came close to Hussain.

urdu transliteration text:
aur phir raqaab thaam ke boli ay shahe deen
lo mai sawaar karti hoo abbas gar nahi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Holding the horses stirrups, she said ‘I will help you up if Abbas isn’t here’

urdu transliteration text:
?
wayiz hua sawaar jo zehra ka laadla
kohraam mach gaya...
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
